title: Fix hot restart & boot message delivery + add Boot tag support
summary: Hot restart confirmation messages and BOOT.md responses are never persisted to session history, so they don't appear in web UI or Telegram. Fix: (1) addMessage() the response in both flows, (2) broadcast to Telegram when previous session existed, (3) create timestamped Boot session with tag instead of reusing boot-startup, so each boot gets a persistent tagged session visible in chat history.

affectedFiles.description: Add message persistence and Telegram notification for hot restarts
Add message persistence and Boot tags for gateway startup
Add tags field to Session interface to support session tagging
